🍽️ Tip Calculator

Calculate the tip and split the bill between any number of people instantly.

15%
Enter the bill amount

Common tip amounts

What is a tip calculator?

A tip calculator helps you quickly calculate how much to tip at a restaurant or for a service, and how to split the total bill (including tip) fairly between multiple people.

Frequently asked questions

How much should I tip at a restaurant?

In the UK, 10–15% is standard. In the USA, 15–20% is expected. In most of Europe, tipping is optional — rounding up or leaving 5–10% is appreciated but not required.

Should I tip on the pre-tax or post-tax amount?

In the USA it is common to tip on the pre-tax subtotal. In the UK and Europe, tipping on the total (including tax) is more common.

How do I split the bill equally?

Enter the total bill, select your tip percentage and enter the number of people. The calculator shows exactly how much each person should pay.
